segments.beat: Device lying flat on wood surface, slight overhead angle; clear shell and active display visible from the start
Camera slowly orbits clockwise around device; PCB internals and copper traces become visible through shell sides
Orbit continues past 90 degrees; D-pad and A/B button layout fully legible; display still lit
Camera sweeps to near-portrait angle; full device footprint readable against wood grain, ends on close profile

demonstrates.motion_value: high — continuous orbit reveals PCB, copper flex cable, and component layer through clear shell walls
medium — display stays lit throughout; teal pixel glow visible against transparent pane across all frames
low — device footprint against wood surface implies small size but no reference object
low — D-pad and A/B layout visible during orbit but not interacted with
medium — resin shell edges and finish catch light during orbit, suggesting premium material

selection_note: Clean slow orbit on a static device; strongest asset for transparency_internals_visible and see_through_display_on hero use; loops well from 0:00 back to start with no hard cut.

aesthetics.standout: clean wood-grain background keeps it uncluttered
aesthetics.weakness: overhead handheld drift, cold blue-teal tint, device never fills frame
aesthetics.note: 7s slow orbit of a small transparent device on a table - no hero moment, no intentional camera move
